markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strapi and GrowthX weekly sync to discuss content strategy, ad keywords, and workflow integration.](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team introduced new member Andrej, who will handle Strapi's account and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Strapi discontinued paid ads due to poor performance and quality of traffic; focus shifted to organic content](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Content strategy will prioritize recouping lost organic traffic for high-value keywords (e.g., React CMS, Next.js CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver 10 new articles by week's end, focusing on templated content and competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Updating existing content identified as a high-value opportunity for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### Ad Keywords and Paid Strategy

  - [Strapi discontinued paid ads in July due to:](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Poor traffic generation (600 visitors/month from paid vs. 150k-180k organic)](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [Low-quality leads (negative scores in HubSpot)](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Target audience (developers) less likely to click on ads](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [Limited budget compared to competitors (e.g., Sanity, Contentful)](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Current ad spend reduced to $200-$300/month](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Retargeting efforts also yielded poor results](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Organic Traffic and SEO Focus

  - [Lost rankings for high-value keywords: React CMS, Next.js CMS, Angular CMS](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Strategy shift to recoup organic traffic for frontend technology + CMS keywords](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [GrowthX to prioritize content around these topics](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Content Strategy and Templates

  - [10 new articles in progress, to be delivered by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Focus on creating topic clusters for greater topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Content types include:](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Technical tutorials for Strapi users](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Top-of-funnel trending topics](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Educational content on CMS use cases](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Competitive comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - ["Alternative to Strapi" counter-strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Templated approach for scalable content production (e.g., headless CMS for specific industries/use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### Content Updates and Optimization

  - [Identified as a significant opportunity due to outdated existing content](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests updating low-performing content first](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing meta titles, descriptions, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Potential for quick wins: 200-250 impressions/day to 1000 impressions overnight for updated articles](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

### Workflow Integration and CMS Access

  - [ARPS integration tested on personal sites, but caution advised for main Strapi site](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Recommendation to manually calibrate and publish initial content before automating](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [GrowthX team to handle all formatting and uploading to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Strapi team to provide CMS access and schedule a walkthrough for the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Additional Considerations

  - [Strapi to share battle cards for more in-depth competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Add "agencies/web agencies" as an important persona to content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Consider incorporating insights from successful sales calls (pending legal approval)](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [GrowthX to manage action items and provide regular updates on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Strapi to share battle cards and additional use cases/verticals information](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Schedule CMS walkthrough for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin publishing initial set of articles](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Strapi to provide feedback on published content](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Explore potential for setting up a staging environment for testing ARPS integration](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [GrowthX to send follow-up email with meeting notes and action items](https://fathom.video/share/nHq8Za1wcHg7ysSbB-N9qzrQZSRY_jpd?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
